activityOfUser.occupation: Tvořím junior.guru, které pomáhá juniorním programátorům

text:
Supporting the future generations of tech talent is a topic near & dear to my heart, ever since I started in TA 10 years ago. So, it was a great honour & pleasure when I got the last-minute invite from Honza & Daria, to share some of my experience with hiring dozens of juniors - and to participate in a panel, happening in less than 24 hours, on 'Landing A Great Job' 🤩💼 - at the Beginners' Day Unconference in Prague, under the umbrella of EuroPython.

Big thanks to both of the organizers, and especially to everyone who attended - for your passion about both Python & learning, for the interactive Q&A, as well as for the chats afterwards! 🐍🙌 
I really enjoyed my time at the conference, and I’m sure you have a bright career ahead of you in tech (and plenty of fun leveraging Python for your projects)!😊

🎤 A special thanks goes to the moderator Daria, as well as my co-panelist Jana Moudrá from Juicymo, for a fruitful discussion! 

(Last but not least, this event once again reminded me, how grateful I'm to my employer, SentinelOne, for equipping me with best practice in how to prepare, bring onboard & further grow juniors 💜🌱).

#BeginnersDayUnconference #EuroPython2025 #EuroPython #techrecruiting #talentacquisition #Python #PythonJuniors EuroPython
